blueprint_parser_mode_switching.overview: This mode owns document-to-business-object interpretation and generation. It should switch modes when the task moves beyond blueprint parsing and JSON artifact creation.

scenario.trigger: User wants toolkit packaging or TWX generation after business object artifacts are ready
scenario.reason: Packaging and deployment workflows belong to the dedicated package manager mode.

scenario.trigger: User wants to create or modify widgets based on the generated business objects
scenario.reason: Widget implementation belongs to the BAW Coach Widget mode, not the blueprint parser mode.

scenario.trigger: User wants to compose a coach or service flow using the generated business objects
scenario.reason: Coach composition and service flow generation belong to the coach composer mode.

scenario.description: Business object normalization and JSON generation
Catalog generation and generation summary creation
Validation of generated artifact readiness prior to packaging

practice.name: Switch only after generation scope is complete
practice.description: Finish business object extraction, normalization, and artifact generation before switching to another mode for downstream work.

practice.name: Preserve generation context in the handoff
practice.description: When switching, mention the business context, source blueprints, and what artifact set was produced so the receiving mode starts with the right context.

practice.name: Do not package in this mode just to save time
practice.description: Even if packaging seems straightforward, keep the generation and packaging boundaries explicit and clean.

switch_templates.template: <switch_mode> <mode_slug>baw-package-manager</mode_slug> <reason>Generated business object JSON catalog is ready for toolkit packaging.</reason> </switch_mode>
<switch_mode> <mode_slug>baw-coachui-view</mode_slug> <reason>Business objects are ready and the task now requires widget implementation work.</reason> </switch_mode>
<switch_mode> <mode_slug>baw-coach-composer</mode_slug> <reason>Business objects are ready and the task now requires coach or service flow composition.</reason> </switch_mode>
